mood: Calm, practical, premium, legible, and touch-friendly. A low-stimulus interface with natural colors.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing, generous hit targets for touch, mobile-first.

button_primary.style: bg-[#C85A3C] text-white font-medium rounded-xl px-6 py-3.5 flex items-center justify-center transition-all

button_secondary.style: bg-white text-[#2C5530] border border-[#2C5530] font-medium rounded-xl px-6 py-3.5 flex items-center justify-center transition-all

chip_selected.style: bg-[#2C5530] text-white rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

chip_unselected.style: bg-[#EFEBE1] text-[#6E6D69] rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#E5E1D8] hover:text-[#222222]

bottom_nav.style: bg-white border-t border-[#E5E1D8] pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-between items-center

stepper.style: flex items-center gap-4 bg-white p-2 rounded-xl border border-[#E5E1D8]

motion_and_interactions.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow-md for interactive cards.
motion_and_interactions.tap_state: Scale down slightly on press (active:scale-95) for buttons and chips to provide tactile mobile feedback.

hero_background.description: A man unpacks groceries from a paper bag on a kitchen counter with fresh vegetables. Good for onboarding or empty states.

kitchen_prep.description: Two adults wash and slice fresh vegetables on a kitchen counter. Good for Recipe cards or meal planning visuals.

inventory_placeholder.description: Broccoli and cauliflower florets. Use as a placeholder for inventory items.

icons_and_assets.size: w-5 h-5 or w-6 h-6 for mobile hit areas

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI using Expo React Native / Web conventions.
Ensure touch targets are at least 44x44px. This means buttons, chips, and nav items need adequate padding.
For the 'This Week' view, use a card-based bento layout with generous spacing.
Implement chips for multi-select (e.g., stores, meals).
Implement steppers and sliders for budget and quantity adjustments.
The Primary CTA 'Build This Week's Plan' should be highly visible, using the accent color (#C85A3C).
Use Manrope for headings and DM Sans for body text.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements (chips, buttons, inputs).
Do not use default shadcn styles blindly; customize the radii (rounded-xl) and colors to match the earthy theme.
Ensure the bottom tab navigation is fixed at the bottom, clearly indicating the active tab.
Do not use dark mode. The application must remain light, airy, and practical.
